description: Orange and grey rucksack with embroidered branding at the front and one haul loop at the baseOne non-padded haul loop at the top and two padded and adjustable shoulder straps with tab detail for extra storage, branding on one and are connected with a click-clasp closureHas padded and adjustable waist belt secured with click-clasp closureOne main compartment secured with dual drawstring closures and a click-clasp closure, has a large slip pocket insideA flap at the top with loops and toggle detail, has an external and internal zipped pocketMesh stash pocket on either side with elasticated mouthAdjustable tabs and click-clasp closures at the sides for customizing the sizePadded mesh backWarranty: 5 yearsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
